name: Scrambled Eggs with Andouille Sausage and Toast
description: Crispy andouille and fluffy eggs — a protein-packed Southern breakfast that comes together in 10 minutes.
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces andouille sausage links (or 8 oz sliced)
recipeInstructions: Cook the sausage: Cook 4 pieces andouille sausage links (or 8 oz sliced) in a skillet over medium heat, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, about 5–6 min. Remove from pan.
Whisk the eggs: Whisk 6 pieces large eggs with 2 tablespoons milk or cream, 0.5 teaspoons salt, and 0.3 teaspoons black pepper until smooth.

Scramble the eggs: Melt 2 tablespoons butter in the same skillet over medium-low heat. Add eggs and cook gently, folding slowly with a spatula, until just set. Remove from heat while still slightly glossy.
Toast and serve: Toast 4 pieces slices whole wheat bread. Plate with eggs, sausage, and a sprinkle of 2 pieces green onions, sliced (optional) if using.
